title: Relics Of The Sky
description: A 1.12.2 mod, providing new possibility for skyblock startup
body:
## Relics Of The Sky
---
Relics Of The Sky is a 1.12.2 mod which provides resources for skyblock with a feature--relics. These relics can be obtained from relic chest, which allows the player to choose one from three relics.
Relics can either provide necessary resources to develop or simply make the game better. For example, a "Wand of the Nature" can apply bonemeal by rightclicking, allowing the player to skip the annoying part of waiting the tree to grow. A "Sand of the Time" passively generates sand at a speed of 1/sec and automatically ejects to the container above it. A "Magic Cookie" increases the amount of relics in a relic chest, making it easier to get powerful relics.

This is my first mod. Before making this, I was completely new to minecraft modding so please don't scold me for making silly mistakes XD
